name: ExtensionImagingSelection_Performer
title: R5: Selector of the instances (human or machine) (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ImagingSelection.performer` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ImagingSelection.performer` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `ImagingSelection.performer` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ImagingSelection.performer` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ImagingSelection` is not mapped.
Element `ImagingSelection.performer` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.requirements:
Allows disambiguation of the types and involvement of different performers. Element `ImagingSelection.performer.function` is part of an existing definition because parent element `ImagingSelection.performer` requires a cross-version extension.
Element `ImagingSelection.performer.function` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ImagingSelection` is not mapped.
Element `ImagingSelection.performer.function` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition: Distinguishes the type of involvement of the performer.

binding.description: The type of involvement of the performer.
